programmes.show_description: Éamon de Valera a bhí ina Uachtarán ar Éirinn ó 1959-73 a bheidh faoi chaibidil sa gclár seo. (Éamon de Valera who was President of Ireland from 1959-73 is the focus of this episode.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Leanfaidh an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt follows in the footsteps of Annraoi Ó Liatháin along the River Suir.)
Feicfear Craobh Lomadh Caorach na hÉireann ag Seó Chluain Maine sa gclár seo. (We head to the Clonmany Show to see the All-Ireland Sheep Shearing Championship.)
Is in Bratislava a chuirfidh Séaghan, Proinsias agus Louise deireadh leis an tsraith. (The gang's final stop is Bratislava, and they're going out with a bang!)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá cuileog sa teach! Tá Clúmh ina dhiaidh agus níl tada chun é a stopadh. (There's a fly in the den! Fluff is in hot pursuit, and nothing will stand in his way.)
Téann Melody agus Bop chuig an margadh agus tá neart ar díol ag na stainníní éagsúla. (Melody and Bop are in the market where there are stalls selling lots of different things.)
Bíonn air Timmy teacht i gcabhair ar a chairde. (When Timmy's friends get in trouble by the seaside, he has to try and rescue them.)
Ag seoltóireacht a bheidh Abby agus Rudy inniu! (Abby and Rudy are sailing on the high seas today!)
Ní mór do Pip agus Posy a thaispeáint do Zac nach gá dó faitíos a bheith air roimh stoirmeacha. (Pip and Posy must show Zac that storms aren't anything to be afraid of.)
Tá fail ar Iasc Mór agus déanann na hOlobobanna 'Deilgneach' le cabhrú léi. (When Big Fish has hiccups the Olobobs make her Prickle, who encourages her to keep calm.)
Caitheann Kevin am le Gekko mar nach dteastaíonn uaidh a bheith dána ar nós Howler agus Rip. (While The Wolfys run amok, Gekko doubts he has what it takes to be good.)
Milleann Wussywat dhá cháca breithlá Oirtís agus caithfidh sí ceann nua a fháil anois. (Wussywat accidentally ruins both of Ortus' birthday cakes.)
Rachaidh Zou agus a chairde ag iascaireacht inniu. Tá comórtas idir Uncail Zavier agus Zou. (Zou and his friends go fishing today.)
Beidh Ricky ag tabhairt aire d'fhéileacán inniu. (Today, Ricky tries to look after a butterfly!)
Tá Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex ag iarraidh an Fatadón a bhlaiseadh. (Ginger and the Pea Rex's want to lick the Potatodon.)
Aimsíonn Dot agus a cairde rud aisteach sa loch. (Dot and her friends come across a strange item deep in the lake.)
Faigheann Henry preabaire mar bhronntanas agus socraíonn Ella ceann a dhéanamh di féin. (Henry receives a Space Hopper as a present and  Ella decides she will make one.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Lola ag ceapadh go bhfuil an t-ádh ag rith léi, sin go dtéann chuig an bpictiúrlann le Charlie. (Lola feels extremely lucky until she and Charlie set out to go to the cinema.)
Imríonn Pinocchio cleas ar na Banphrionsaí Jodelle agus Neantóg. (Pinocchio plays a trick on Princesses Jodelle and Neantóg.)
Cuireann Sleamhnaí muince ghoidte i bhfolach i seanbhábóg. (Sleamhnaí hides a stolen necklace inside an old doll.)
Tá Angelo ag iarraidh amhrán nua an bhanna 'Slobber' a chloisteáil. (The band Slobber have a new song and Angelo wants to hear it.)
Tugann Dónall a chuid bréagán ar fad uaidh. (Dónall gives away all of his toys.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi bheith ag oscailt agus ag dúnadh a bheidh inniu againn. (A fun song about opening and shutting.)
Cuireann Deich roinnt Blocuimhreacha ag déanamh aclaíochta. (Ten gets some of the Numberblocks exercising.)
Tá iontas ar na Dathanna faoi na dathanna ar fad is féidir a úsáid chun Donn a dhéanamh. (The Colours are surprised to see how many Colours can make Brown.)
Cabhraíonn na Blociontais le hEalaí an t-urlár rince a mhaisiú. (The Wonderblocks help Arty hop in different directions to light up the disco floor!)
Caithfidh na Blocuimhreacha dul sa tóir ar thaisce an Chaptaen Heicsea-Fhéasóg! (The Numberblocks must seek Captain Hexabeard's treasure.)
Líonann Posy a bolg sula dtéann sí chuig teach Pip ach bíonn féasta réitithe ag Pip dóibh. (Posy fills up on snacks whilst heading to Pip's house but Pip has prepared a feast.)
Bhí an-lá ag Ribín ach bhí fíor-dhrochlá ag Glibín. Céard a tharla? (Ribín had an amazing day but poor Glibín had a terrible day. How could this be?)
Daltaí Ghaelscoil Chluain Dolcáin a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi na séasúir. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)
Tá George cinnte go bhfuil eilifint ina pheata ag an gcomharsa thuas staighre. (George is convinced that the new upstairs neighbour has an elephant as a pet.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina theagascóir aclaíochta nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a gym instructor when he grows up.)
Imreoidh Zou agus a chairde cluichí séabracha sa sneachta inniu. (Zou and his friends enjoy some zebric games in the snow today.)
Is é an Méara de Pfeffel a bheidh ina mholtóir ar Chomórtas na mBláthbhoscaí Fuinneoige. (Mayor de Pfeffel is going to be judging the Wonderful Window-Box Competition.)
Inniu feicfidh muid réabadh, grá agus ruaille buaille! (Today we'll see action, romance and plenty of drama!)
Máire Ní Chéileachair a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín ar an gclár seo. (Máire Ní Chéileachar from Cork will be chatting to Máirtín Tom Sheáinín on this show.)
Tagann dochtúir Hal ar mheall le linn scrúdú sláinte. (Hal's doctor finds a suspicious lump during a routine medical checkup.)
Castar mian a chroí ar Cliff ag cóisir Oíche Shamhna in Cheers. (During a Halloween party at Cheers, Cliff meets the girl of his dreams.)
Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta, beidh an Four Star Trio agus Mary Mitchell sa gclár seo. (This programme features the Four Star Trio, Eoin and Danny Ó Súilleabháin and Mary Mitchell.)
Dúnmharaítear duine de na haíonna ag cóisir bhréigéide. (An unwanted guest is murdered at a costume party.)
Léargas ar shaol fíorshuimiúil ainmhithe fiáine as ceithre hairde na cruinne. (We explore the rich and varied world of animal behaviour.)
Téann Paul ar thuras ag dul ó Loch Gairloch go Loch Maree. (Paul travels from Loch Gairloch to Loch Maree.)
Beidh scoth an cheoil tíre ar an gclár seo le Robert Mizell agus Anne-Marie O'Connor. (This show features the best Country music featuring Robert Mizell & Anne-Marie O'Connor.)
Socraíonn Joe agus Amy bogadh go háit éigin níos teo cois farraige. (Joe and Amy succumb to the lure of warmer weather and a seaside location.)

Tá Leithreas Lugh ag baint an-sult as Oíche Shamhna agus é ag scanrú daoine. (Leithreas Lugh is enjoying Halloween, scaring all who knock on the door of his lair.)

Clár deiridh na sraithe: beidh an Grúpa Ceirde i Ré na nDoirí ag taispeáint a gcuid oibre. (In the final episode, the Grúpa Ceirde in Ré na nDoirí show us their creations.)
Tá plean ag Cam chun an ceann is fearr a fháil ar Cora. (Cam comes up with a plan to sabotage Cora and manages to get Vince in on it too.)

Tá Téacs Taistil ar ais! Tugann na taistealaithe aghaidh ar Toronto sa gclár seo. (Téacs Taistil is back! This week, the gang touch down in Toronto.)
Tugtar léargas ar thionscal dorcha na seacláide sa gclár faisnéise seo. (A gripping documentary about the bitter side of chocolate production.)

Oibríonn Olmsted a& Witt as lámh a chéile ach níl sé éasca Dot a sháinniú. (Officer Olmsted & State trooper Witt join forces to get to the truth, but Dot isn't so easy to corner.)

Samhlaíonn Bréidín go bhfuil sé féin agus Clúmh ar muir. (Tweedy tries to pretend that himself and Fluff are at sea.)
Bí ag gabháil fhoinn le Cody agus é ag spraoi lena dheirfiúr óg. (Sing along as Cody follows his baby sister around.)
Réiltín thuas sa spéir ag lonrú anuas orainn go léir. (Twinkle twinkle little star how I wonder what you are?)
Tá muintir Loop ag fáil faoi réir d'Oíche Chinn Bliana. (It's New Year's Eve and preparations are well underway in the Loop household.)
Ag foghlaim faoi mhonarchana a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about factories today.)
Déanann Pip agus Posy dearmad Frankie a fháil nuair a bhíonn siad ag imirt folach bíog. (While playing hide-and-seek together, Pip and Posy totally forget to find Frankie.)
Is sióg í an cara nua atá ag Cnag ach níl aon duine eile in ann í a fheiceáil. (Crunch finds a new fairy friend that no one else can see.)
Tá plean ag Rip chun an ceann is fearr a fháil ar na mascanna ag úsáid chleití Owlette. (Rip tries to gather feathers from Owlette's wings to let the Wolfies fly.)
Tá Wussywat maraithe leis an teas. Caithfidh sí fuarú. (It's a hot day in the garden and Wussywat really needs to cool down.)
Ba mhaith le Emily agus le Clifford a bheith 'mór'. (Emily Elizabeth and Clifford decide to be "grown ups" and do what they think adults do.)
Baintear geit as na cairde nuair a chroitheann an talamh faoina gcosa. (The friends are frightened by mysterious underground ructions.)
Éiríonn Ginger agus na Piseanna mór le hArbharsáralófas óg atá imithe óna thréad. (A young Cornasaurolophus strays from its herd and befriends Ginger and the Peas.)
Níl Adam agus Lily ag tarraingt le chéile beag ná mór. (Adam and Lily aren't getting along well.)
Faigheann Alice réiltín óir ag an scoil agus déanann sí a seacht míle dícheall tuilleadh a fháil sa mbaile. (Alice gets a gold star at school and she tries to get more at home.)
Tá Alice ag cuimhneamh ar dul ar saoire lena teaghlach. (Alice imagines her family holiday.)
Ní chreideann Oli go bhfuil boinn óir buaite ag a máthair. (Oli the Octopus can't believe the incredible facts she learns about her gold medal winning Mum.)

Is breá le Lola a bróga snasta dearga ach tá siad róbheag aici. (Lola's favourite red shiny shoes are too small for her.)
Tá ceannaire na léamar goidte ag an gCró-Mháistreas ionas go leanfaidh na léamair eile é. (The Ringmaster steals the leader of a group of lemurs so that the others will follow.)
Tá uibheacha Cásca i bhfolach ag Lola agus caithfidh a cairde iad a aimsiú. (Lola organises an Easter egg hunt for her friends.)
Tá rudaí le deisiú ag athair Angelo sa teach. (Angelo's father has to fix things in the house.)
Tá Peigí Pusach ag iarraidh ar Dhónall a huimhir a chuir ina fhón póca. (Peigí wants Dónall to add her phone number to his contacts.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoin mbogha báistí a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about the rainbow.)
Caithfidh na Blocuimhreacha an uimhir chéanna a bheith ar an dá thaobh de gach droichead le hé a dhéanamh cothrom. (The Numberblocks need to have the same number on each side.)
Beidh spraoi ag na Dathanna in éineacht leis na Clódóirí inniu. (Today, the Colours have fun with the Printing Crew.)
Tugann na Blociontais cúnamh d'Ealaí sruthán a thrasnú ar chlocha cora. (The Wonderblocks help Arty figure out the right directions to cross some stepping-stones.)
Tá Timmy agus Meannán an-tógtha le triantáin. (Timmy and Kid are obsessed with triangles.)
Tá Megan leis an lá a chaitheamh in éineacht lena Daideo Páraic. (Megan is going to spend the day with Daideo Páraic.)
Níl Pip ag iarraidh an cairrín aeir a rinne sé a thabhairt do Posy ar fhaitíos go mbrisfeadh sí é. (Pip won't let Posy have a turn with his flying buggy in case she breaks it.)
Baineann préachán geit as Art. Ní maith leis go bhfuil sé chomh héasca sin é a scanrú. (Art gets startled by a crow and is upset that he scares so easily.)
Ligeann Gobnait uirthi féin gur cat í agus gurb iad a cairde na cait óga atá aici. (Gobnait wants to pretend she's a mother cat and her friends are her little kittens.)
Tá bís ar Mháire agus ar Mhicheál Mac Tíre a seomra féin a bheith acu. (The Wolf Twins are excited to finally get their own room.)
Samhlaíonn Muireann a saol ina tréidlia nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Muireann imagines her life as a vet when she grows up.)
Éiríonn le Zou pictiúr álainn a phéinteáil i ngan fhios dó féin. (By accident Zou manages to paint a lovely picture today.)
Beidh an Méara de Pfeffel ag déanamh moltóireacht ar na gairdíní amárach! (Mayor de Pfeffel will be judging the gardens tomorrow!)
Ar chlár an lae inniu beidh madraí uisce ceolmhara, madraí ag gabhail fhoinn agus damhsóirí den scoth. (Today we'll see otter musicians, canine singers and amazing dancers.)

Tagann fear ar cuairt a deir go mbíodh sé ag siúl amach le Rose nuair a bhí siad ina ndéagóirí. (A man from St. Olaf visits claiming he dated Rose when they were teenagers.)

programmes.show_name: An Western: Pat Garrett & Billy the Kid
programmes.show_description: Fostaítear Garrett chun a sheanchara Billy the Kid a ghabháil. (Pat Garrett is hired as a lawman to bring down his old friend Billy the Kid.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Leanfaidh an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt follows in the footsteps of Annraoi Ó Liatháin along the River Suir.)
